description.content: Create, update, and manage access control policies for users and groups.
Create a new access policy for the organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Get all access policies of the organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Update an existing access policy.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Create, update, list, and delete Spot accounts within an organization.
Create a new account within an organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Get a list of Spot accounts in your organization. When used without parameters, the provided token must have Organization Admin permissions and the output will contain all the organization accounts.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Update an existing account.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Delete an existing account.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Retrieve audit logs for actions performed within the organization.
Retrieve audit log events for the organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Create, get, update, and delete users. Manage user permissions and account assignments.
Create a new user and link it to the creator's organization. If the role is a viewer, the user is also linked to the default account for the organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Get all users in the organization, their details, and mapped accounts. Providing the optional account ID parameter will filter out all users not mapped to that account.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Get details of a specific user.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Update user permissions and role assignments.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Delete a user from the organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Create a programmatic user for API access.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Spot Administration API provides endpoints for managing organizations, accounts, users, access policies, cloud credentials, subscriptions, and event notifications within the Spot by Flexera platform. It enables programmatic control over user permissions, account setup, and cloud provider credential linking for AWS, Azure, and GCP.

Contact Support:
 Name: Spot by Flexera
